combined_offerings.title: Boundary Bay & Lighthouse Park kelp canopy observations 2025-2026
combined_offerings.cleared_text: Public-shoreline citizen observations of bull-kelp surface canopy. Each entry: date (ISO), site (string), canopy_percent (0-100), observer_alias (string). Locations are public coastal access points only.

combined_offerings.title: Salish Sea volunteer stewardship action log (public events)
combined_offerings.cleared_text: Public-facing stewardship action log. Each entry: date (ISO), bioregion (string), action_type (one of: work-party, beach-cleanup, eelgrass-survey, kelp-count, planting), site_alias (string). Only events advertised on public calendars are included.

combined_offerings.title: Host-Nation stewardship cycle reference (held by team)
combined_offerings.cleared_text: (not cleared — held by team; a host-Nation-internal seasonal cycle reference shared in confidence by a partner organization. Mentioned in framing only; not in the dataset, not in the AI input, not in the displayed output.)

combined_boundaries.label: Observer real names and contact details
combined_boundaries.marker_text: Real observer names + emails are held in the team's roster spreadsheet, not in the cleared dataset. Only aliases appear in any AI input.

combined_boundaries.label: Host-Nation stewardship cycle reference
combined_boundaries.marker_text: A partner-organization reference document held by the team. Shapes our private thinking about the calendar but is not in the dataset, not in any AI input, and not in any output shown Tuesday.

combined_boundaries.label: Volunteer real names
combined_boundaries.marker_text: Volunteer rosters live in the team's own roster spreadsheet. Only site_alias appears in the dataset sent to the AI.

intersected_authorization.authorization_notes: composed: both teams must re-confirm before any build attempt or display

freeze_note: each team must re-confirm their offerings + boundaries in the composed context
boundary: This bundle is a CANDIDATE composition. It has not been frozen for build. Both teams must re-confirm before any build attempt runs against this bundle.
